chunks.title: Solomon's Palace Construction
chunks.reason: Describes the building and dimensions of Solomon's royal residence.

chunks.title: The Two Bronze Pillars
chunks.reason: Details the casting and setting of the pillars Jachin and Boaz.

chunks.title: The Bronze Sea
chunks.reason: Describes the large cast metal basin supported by twelve oxen.

chunks.title: The Ten Stands and Lavers
chunks.reason: Outlines the construction and placement of ten bronze stands with lavers.

chunks.title: Summary of Hiram's Bronze Work
chunks.reason: Catalogs the specific bronze items made by Hiram and notes their casting location.

chunks.title: Furniture of the Temple
chunks.reason: Lists the golden furniture and utensils placed inside the house of Yahweh.

chunks.title: Completion and Dedication
chunks.reason: Concludes the work and describes Solomon bringing David's treasures into the treasuries.
